title: RBI Penalty on Bandhan Bank for KYC Non-compliance and Credit Risk Management Deficiencies
description: <cite index="30-9,30-10,30-11">Reserve Bank of India imposed a penalty of Rs. 41.8 lakh on Bandhan Bank for non-compliance with regulatory norms, including Know Your Customer guidelines, and for failing to conduct periodic review of risk categorisation for certain accounts and having sanctioned director-related loans.</cite>
